title: Howrah Court Sweeper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
shortInfo: Howrah Court Sweeper Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website Howrah Court. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Howrah Court Sweeper Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: Howrah Court Sweeper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Howrah Court Sweeper Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website Howrah Court. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Howrah Court Sweeper Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Howrah Court Sweeper Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://howrah.dcourts.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Howrah Court Sweeper recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Howrah Court Sweeper (Karmabandhu) posts is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Sweeper post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Class VIII to be eligible for the Sweeper (Karmabandhu) position at Howrah Court. This is the minimum educational requirement.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Sweeper (Karmabandhu) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Sweeper (Karmabandhu) post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 5000/-. This is the consolidated remuneration for the contractual role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 years and 40 years. Candidates falling within this age bracket are eligible to apply for the advertised posts.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Howrah Court Sweeper recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates applying for the Howrah Court Sweeper (Karmabandhu) recruitment. All candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Sweeper (Karmabandhu) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Sweeper (Karmabandhu) position will be based on an interview. Candidates shortlisted after the initial screening will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Sweeper post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Sweeper (Karmabandhu) post in the Howrah Court recruitment. These are contractual positions.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Sweeper (Karmabandhu) posts is contractual. This means the employment will be for a fixed period as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Howrah Court, which is https://howrah.dcourts.gov.in/. Please refer to the Important Links section for direct access.
